title: Multi-dimensional salience scoring — composite formula replaces single importance int
resolution: memory/salience.py created: composite_salience (0.30*imp + 0.25*surprise + 0.20*goal + 0.15*recency + 0.10*affect), recency_weight (exp decay, 30d half-life), affect_bonus (urgent=0.8, important=0.5, painful=0.4, joyful=0.3, neutral=0.0), effective_importance (T-135 Ebbinghaus, pinned rows immune), default_decay_rate (per-category), is_composite_mode (PI_SALIENCE_MODE=composite). _init_sqlite PRAGMA-adds 6 new columns: surprise_score, goal_alignment, affect_tag, decay_rate, pinned, last_accessed_at. memory_write L3 path computes scores at insert. _l3_fast_path and _hybrid_search_l3 BM25 path both updated: 12-col SELECT with NULL fallback on OperationalError (Invariant 8), composite mode branching gated by PI_SALIENCE_MODE=composite. Also fixed _tokenize to split on underscores ([^a-zA-Z0-9\s]) so UUID-prefixed content like t001_rw_{uuid} tokenizes correctly for BM25. testing/test_salience.py: 30 tests. verify.py PASS.
